channel.title: Cableguys on Últimas ofertas en consolas y gaming

item.title: Cableguys - Cable Guys - Modern Sonic the Hedgehog Gaming Accessories Holder & Phone Holder for Controller Xbox Play Station Nintendo Switch & Phone Iphone Samsung Galaxy Google Pixel
item.description:
Está Cableguys - Cable Guys - Modern Sonic the Hedgehog Gaming Accessories Holder & Phone Holder for Controller Xbox Play Station Nintendo Switch & Phone Iphone Samsung Galaxy Google Pixel en el siguiente enlace!

ℹ️:

  • SONIC THE HEDGEHOG FANS: If youre a Sonic the Hedgehog gamer, this is the perfect gaming accessory for you. Admire your favourite character as it neatens up the room. Its also a perfect gift to any Sonic player
  • CABLE GUYS: Cable Guys are a range of highly detailed Marvel, Disney, DC Comics & gaming figures, designed and manufactured by a passionate team of fans and gamers. They offer a collectible assortment of your favourite characters that have so many uses
  • PHONE HOLDER: Designed to hold almost any gaming controller while they charge, its also a great phone stand for most mobile phones including iPhone, Samsung & Google Pixel. Keeps hold even with a phone case
  • OFFICIAL SEGA MERCHANDISE: Officially licensed by Sega. Dare-devil Sonic is part of our hugely popular 8" tall Cable Guys range CABLE GUYS: Cable Guys are a range of highly detailed Marvel, Disney, DC Comics & gaming figures, designed and manufactured by a passionate team of fans and gamers. They offer a collectible assortment of your favourite characters that have so many uses
  • CONTROLLER HOLDER: Whether its your Xbox One, Ps5, Nintendo Switch gaming controller or tv remote, it can be held. Including the next-gen PS5 DualSense, Xbox Series X or Xbox Series S

🛒 Ver la oferta!!

Check the price of this item in other countries:

🇬🇧 United Kingdom | 🇺🇸 USA | 🇩🇪 Germany | 🇪🇸 Spain | 🇫🇷 France | 🇮🇹 Italia | 🇦🇪 Arab Emirates | 🇨🇦 Canada | 🇧🇪 Belgium | 🇳🇱 Neederlands | 🇵🇱 Poland | 🇸🇪 Sweden |

item.title: Cableguys - Cable Guys - Star Wars Mandalorian The Child Gaming Accessories Holder & Phone Holder for Most Controller Xbox Play Station Nintendo Switch & Phone
item.description:
Ahora mismo tienes Cableguys - Cable Guys - Star Wars Mandalorian The Child Gaming Accessories Holder & Phone Holder for Most Controller Xbox Play Station Nintendo Switch & Phone en el siguiente enlace!

🔎:

  • Producto con licencia oficial de Disney.
  • Compatible con mando o controller PS4, PS5, Xbox one y Xbox X Series.
  • Personaje Mandalorian the Child de Star Wars - Disney.
  • Compatible con todos los teléfonos móviles o smartphones actuales.
  • Incluye cable de carga de 2 metros (conector lightning, mini USB y USB).

🛒 Visítala!!!

item.title: Cableguys - Cable Guys - Terminator T-800 Gaming Accessories Holder & Phone Holder for Most Controller Xbox Play Station Nintendo Switch & Phone
item.description:
Tienes Cableguys - Cable Guys - Terminator T-800 Gaming Accessories Holder & Phone Holder for Most Controller Xbox Play Station Nintendo Switch & Phone aqui!

🔎:

  • PHONE HOLDER: Designed to hold almost any gaming controller while they charge, its also a great phone stand for most mobile phones including iPhone, Samsung & Google Pixel. Keeps hold even with a phone case
  • TERMINATOR FANS: If youre a fan of T-800, this is the perfect gaming accessory for you. Admire your favourite character as it neatens up the room. As long as it fits into his little hands, it can be held. Its also a perfect gift
  • CONTROLLER HOLDER: Whether its your Xbox One, Ps5, Nintendo Switch gaming controller or tv remote, it can be held. Including the next-gen PS5 DualSense, Xbox Series X or Xbox Series S
  • OFFICIAL TERMINATOR MERCHANDISE: Officially licensed by Terminator. The much-feared Terminator character as his robotic self, T-800 joins our hugely popular 8" tall Cable Guys range

🛒 Comprar!!!

Check the price of this item in other countries:
